title: Serenity 16x
description: A vibrant minimalist texture pack for Minecraft 1.8.9, perfect for Bedwars!
body:
## 🎉 What is it?
- Introducing the Serenity 16x Texture Pack, the ultimate choice for Minecraft PvP! Perfect for Bedwars, fireball fights, and more!

## 🌟 Features:
- Cool Swords: Swords are Adjusted to give you a clearer view of the action.
- Custom Sky & Hotbar: Unique sky and customized hotbar for a fresh look.
- Compatibility: Works with Minecraft 1.6.1 to 1.20.2, with 1.8.9 highly recommended.
- Shader Friendly: Compatible with Sodium and Optifine, and shaders that don’t alter textures.
- PvP Focused: Optimized for Hypixel Bedwars and PvP combat.
- Resource Efficient: Lightweight and easy on system resources.

## ❓ FAQs:
### Can I use shaders with this pack?
- Yes, as long as the shader doesn’t modify in-game textures.
### Can I feature this pack in videos or streams?
- Definitely! Just credit the pack and its creator.

## 🖌️ Credits:
- [ItsFlare](https://www.youtube.com/@ItsFlxre) for pack creation, design, and ownership
- [Vanillaspooks](https://www.youtube.com/@VanillaSpooks) for guidance on pack design and texture assistance.
- Tory for the fireball texture.
